---
title: useless-fallthrough
description: "Remove final-case fallthrough."
sidebar:
  badge:
    text: warning
    class: severity-indicator severity-warning
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-warning" aria-hidden="true"></span> `warning`

Remove final-case fallthrough. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
switch value { case 1: use(); fallthrough }
```

## Good

```go
switch value { case 1: use() }
```
